metadata.description: Open-source carrier-grade voice infrastructure — 20 years of telecom engineering distilled into a Claude Code skill plus companion handbook. Specialized knowledge for Kamailio, FreeSWITCH, RTPEngine, Asterisk, and SBC architectures.

plugins.name: voip-engineering
plugins.description: Production-tested expertise for open-source carrier-class voice infrastructure with Kamailio, FreeSWITCH, RTPEngine, and Asterisk. Covers SIP signaling, RTP media, SBC architectures, IVRs, billing integration, and operational diagnostics. Includes voip-doctor.sh for end-to-end troubleshooting and voip-stats-collector.sh for monitoring system integration.
